rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifier references or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics point to subcomponent paths
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers or declared helpers within the same annex scope
Validate that assumed types match actual expression types in AGREE contracts
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level assignments belong in implementation scopes, not component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: Component type annex placement for assumptions and guarantees
AGREE validator diagnostics unrelated to type resolution
